entity_resolution.reason: The source could not be retrieved, so no durable article content or entity linkage can be resolved.

payload.intent: Remember this article URL, but the mock fetch failed with a 404 network error.

memory_cards.statement: The requested article URL could not be fetched because the mock fetch returned a 404 network error.

details: No article content was available to extract.
Only the fetch failure itself was supported by the input.

repair_options: Provide the article text or an accessible mirror URL.
If the URL is expected to be unavailable, supply a summary for ingestion.
